title: Cron: run a worker every hour at minute 0 (UTC)
prompt: Write an Oban config snippet for `config/config.exs` that includes a `Oban.Plugins.Cron` plugin running `MyApp.Workers.HourlyReportWorker` at minute 0 of every hour (`"0 * * * *"`). Use the default UTC timezone. The snippet must include the repo and at least the `:reports` queue. Write to `config/config.exs`.
tier_rationale: Single cron entry with 5-field expression; no subtlety.
